objective: Create Demo Checkpoint 1 PR3 as the provider abstraction plus real TTS slice after merged PR #236 / issue #235. Positive claims: C1-TTS-001 server-side TTS provider abstraction keeps mock/local as default for local/dev/test/CI; C1-TTS-002 optional real TTS adapter remains disabled unless provider config, env-only key, selected-provider source facts, language support, script length, quota, timeout, retry, duplicate-spend, and redaction gates pass; C1-TTS-003 TTS artifacts are bound to source run, trace ID, language, audience, script checksum, citation/eval metadata, provider ID/model/version, and artifact checksum; C1-TTS-004 provider outputs and artifact bytes are treated as untrusted and validated before storage, display, download, or logging; C1-TTS-005 retention/deletion/tombstone/provider-side deletion evidence paths exist for TTS artifacts; C1-TTS-006 every changed PR3 claim maps to an executable test, gate, official source fact, human-only checklist row, or documented non-goal. Negative invariants: no avatar/video provider, hosted deployment, hosted access-system implementation, public URL, cloned voice, cloned face/avatar, cloned identity, Product Mode 2, public synthetic-media distribution, production-readiness claim, provider account setup, dashboard configuration, paid plan activation, wallet funding, paid spend, real provider calls in CI, or real provider test calls without a fresh PR3 plan and explicit written owner approval.

forbidden: real provider test calls without explicit written owner approval
